response.justification: Candidate has strong, broad software engineering experience (15+ years) with solid full-stack and some DevOps/CI work, but the role explicitly requires people management (2+ years) and formal technical leadership (3+ years), neither of which is evidenced in the resume. There is also no demonstrated experience building developer tools at scale (compilers, build systems, test automation infrastructure) nor any mobile-platform ecosystem work relevant to the team's focus.
strengths: 15+ years of polyglot engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded
Demonstrated craftsmanship practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and authored testing libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
Track record of teaching/workshops (Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos, Web Internals) showing mentorship inclination
concerns: No explicit people-management or direct-report leadership experience listed
Lacks dedicated developer-tools/build-systems/test-infrastructure role meeting the 3-year minimum
No mobile-platform ecosystem experience beyond a brief iOS/Apple TV stint a decade ago
